text_generation.description: Generate text responses using language models

memory_management.description: Store and retrieve user information and preferences

image_search.name: image_search
image_search.description: Search for images using DuckDuckGo image search

codebase_inspection.name: codebase_inspection
codebase_inspection.description: Inspect directories, imports, and project structure through runtime analysis tools

project_archive_analysis.name: project_archive_analysis
project_archive_analysis.description: Understand uploaded ZIP projects through framework, config, and code-structure extraction

structured_artifacts.name: structured_artifacts
structured_artifacts.description: Return typed render blocks such as reports, file results, plans, and research cards

dynamic_visualization.name: dynamic_visualization
dynamic_visualization.description: Render dynamic 2D charts and 3D maps from user prompts and uploaded data

session_analytics.name: session_analytics
session_analytics.description: Resolve session-backed artifacts, reports, and latest visualization state for reusable dashboards

conversation_trace_analysis.name: conversation_trace_analysis
conversation_trace_analysis.description: Inspect recent session history and artifact context for debugging, auditing, and follow-up actions

planning_execution.name: planning_execution
planning_execution.description: Create and execute project-aware multi-step plans with verification and typed results

intelligent_code_editing.name: intelligent_code_editing
intelligent_code_editing.description: Perform project-aware code creation, editing, registration, and repair with verification

artifact_reopen.name: artifact_reopen
artifact_reopen.description: Reopen saved research and file artifacts back into chat as structured outputs

research_memory.name: research_memory
research_memory.description: Persist and reuse web research runs with confidence, freshness, and source conflict signals

analytics_dashboard_generation.name: analytics_dashboard_generation
analytics_dashboard_generation.description: Generate reusable analytics dashboards and workspace views backed by dynamic visualization components

codebase_mapping.name: codebase_mapping
codebase_mapping.description: Build a compact architecture map of backend routes, services, frontend views, docs, and tests

regression_evaluation.name: regression_evaluation
regression_evaluation.description: Run internal regression checks for routing, capability registration, and product contracts

self_improvement_planning.name: self_improvement_planning
self_improvement_planning.description: Rank self-improvement proposals using eval signals, codebase structure, and capability gaps

turn_diagnostics.name: turn_diagnostics
turn_diagnostics.description: Capture recent turn-level execution traces including intent, agent usage, search, and render blocks

structured_memory_summary.name: structured_memory_summary
structured_memory_summary.description: Summarize user, project, research, and execution memory into explicit machine-readable buckets

voice_input.name: voice_input
voice_input.description: Capture voice input from the frontend composer when browser speech support is available
